about.title: Redefining Restaurant Reservations in Georgia
about.subtitle: Born in Tbilisi, Tablo bridges the gap between exceptional restaurants and the guests who love them — through technology that feels invisible.
about.storyTitle: From a simple idea to Georgia's dining platform
about.storyP1: Tablo was born from a familiar frustration: trying to book a table at a popular Tbilisi restaurant. Phone calls went unanswered, social media DMs got lost, and walk-ins were always a gamble.
about.storyP2: We built Tablo to solve this — a seamless platform where diners can discover, select their exact table, and get instant confirmation. For restaurant owners, we provide powerful tools to manage reservations, optimize seating, and grow their business.
about.storyP3: Today, Tablo is the leading restaurant reservation platform in Georgia, trusted by dozens of premium restaurants and thousands of happy diners.
about.value1Desc: Every interaction should feel effortless — from browsing to booking to dining.
about.value2Desc: We build tools that genuinely make restaurant owners' lives easier and businesses stronger.
about.value3Desc: Deep understanding of Georgian hospitality, culture, and dining traditions drives our design.
about.value4Desc: Interactive floor plans, real-time availability, and smart CRM — we push boundaries.
about.featuresTitle: Everything you need to dine and manage
about.ctaSubtitle: Whether you're a diner looking for the perfect table or a restaurant owner ready to modernize your bookings, we're here for you.

contact.title: Let's Start a Conversation
contact.subtitle: Whether you're a restaurant owner interested in partnering with us, or a diner with feedback — we'd love to hear from you.
contact.formSuccess: Your message has been sent. We'll get back to you soon!

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Tablo, your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our restaurant reservation platform.
privacy.section1Content: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, phone number, and dining preferences when you create an account or make a reservation. We also automatically collect usage data including your IP address, browser type, and how you interact with our platform.
privacy.section2Content: We use your information to process reservations, communicate booking confirmations, improve our services, personalize your experience, and send relevant notifications about your bookings.
privacy.section3Content: We share relevant booking details with the restaurant you've reserved at (such as your name, party size, and special requests). We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
privacy.section4Content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data, including encryption in transit and at rest. We use Supabase for secure data storage with row-level security policies.
privacy.section5Content: We use essential cookies to maintain your session and preferences. We may use analytics cookies to understand how our platform is used and to improve our services.
privacy.section6Content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You can update your profile information at any time through your account settings, or contact us to request data deletion.
privacy.section7Content: We retain your personal data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services. Booking history is retained for a reasonable period for business and legal purposes.
privacy.section8Content: Our service is not directed to children under 16. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.
privacy.section9Content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes by posting the updated policy on our platform.
privacy.section10Content: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at privacy@tablo.ge.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: Welcome to Tablo. These terms and conditions govern your use of our restaurant reservation platform. By using Tablo, you agree to these terms.
terms.section1Content: By accessing or using Tablo, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use our service.
terms.section2Content: Tablo is an online platform that connects diners with restaurants for the purpose of making table reservations. We facilitate the booking process but are not responsible for the dining experience itself.
terms.section3Content: You must provide accurate information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities under your account.
terms.section4Content: When you make a reservation through Tablo, you enter into a direct arrangement with the restaurant. We facilitate this connection but are not a party to the agreement between you and the restaurant.
terms.section5Content: You may cancel a reservation through your Tablo account. Please respect restaurants' time and cancel as early as possible. Repeated no-shows may result in account restrictions.
terms.section6Content: Restaurant owners who use Tablo agree to honor confirmed reservations and maintain accurate availability information. Restaurants are responsible for their own service quality.
terms.section7Content: You may not misuse the platform, create fake accounts, make fraudulent reservations, or engage in any activity that disrupts the service or harms other users.
terms.section8Content: All content on Tablo, including design, text, graphics, and software, is owned by Tablo LLC and protected by intellectual property laws.
terms.section9Content: Tablo provides the platform 'as is' and is not liable for any direct, indirect, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service or any restaurant experience booked through our platform.
terms.section10Content: Your use of Tablo is also governed by our Privacy Policy. Please review it to understand how we collect and use your information.
terms.section11Content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of Tablo after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.
terms.section12Content: These terms are governed by the laws of Georgia. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Tbilisi, Georgia.
